/cpus/cpu@0,0x0,
/cpus/cpu@1,0x1,
/memory@80000000,0x80000000,0x10000000
/reserved-memory/buffer@90000000,0x90000000,0x100000
/serial@10000000,0x10000000,0x100
/serial@10000100,0x10000100,0x100
/serial@20000100,0x20000100,0x100
/serial@20000100,0x20000200,0x100
/serial@f20000100,0xf20000100,0x100
/interrupt-controller@2f000000,0x2f000000,0x10000
/interrupt-controller@2f000000,0x2f100000,0x200000
/special_bus/device@1000,0x1000,0x200000
/id_map/entry@123456789,0x123456789,
